events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still rolling! Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember when MTV launched 45 years ago today? The first video was ironically 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, the Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that defined a generation.

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today. His music and legacy continue to inspire.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and passed away six days later on September 13; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Hip Hop Legend
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on music and culture.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago. His influence on guitar playing is simply unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on September 26, 1969, featuring its iconic zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock and roll force.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite track he's sung?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' single turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity is as relevant as ever.

events.title: First iPod unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? 25 years ago, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or theme song? Licence to thrill, eh?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Visionary musician and peace activist John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940; he would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the profound impact of John Lennon. Imagine that.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: Legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the utterly brilliant John Cleese! What's your favourite of his iconic roles?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as the 'White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles released their iconic 'White Album'. So diverse, so experimental, so legendary.
